name: remotion
description: Remotion — build videos and motion graphics programmatically with React via the official Remotion MCP, with Remotion's official skill. Requires Node.js.

interface.shortDescription: Programmatic video from React code, with official skill
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Remotion MCP to build videos and motion graphics programmatically with React from UniAI — frame-perfect animation, sequences, audio, and captions. Bundled with Remotion's official best-practices skill. Runs locally and requires Node.js 16+ on your machine.
